tools.name: canary_scan
tools.description: Run a CanaryUsers UX scan on a DEPLOYED URL (your live or preview app — not source code). A flock of AI personas evaluates the page and reports where real users would get stuck, with concrete fixes. Returns AI-ready findings you can act on immediately. Use depth='deep' for the thorough scan that ren

tools.name: list_recent_scans
tools.description: List the most recent CanaryUsers UX scans for your account (id, URL, CanaryScore, grade, status, date). Use this to find a scan to dig into.

tools.name: get_report_markdown
tools.description: Get one scan's full report as AI-ready markdown: the findings ranked by severity, why each matters, and how to fix it. Pass a scanId from list_recent_scans.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "canary_scan" is 915 chars, far longer than this server's median (156). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

evidence.snippet: Run a CanaryUsers UX scan on a DEPLOYED URL (your live or preview app — not source code). A flock of AI personas evaluates the page and reports where real users…

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "canary_scan" stacks urgency/override words (important, immediately, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
